mapper.insert: INSERT INTO insp_report_tb (proj_id, serial_no, insp_dt, create_dt, update_dt) VALUES (#{projId}, #{serialNo}, #{inspDt}, NOW(), null)
mapper.select: SELECT irt.insp_report_id, irt.proj_id, irt.serial_no, irt.insp_dt, irt.create_dt, irt.update_dt, idt.insp_data_id as idt_insp_data_id, idt.insp_report_id as idt_insp_report_id, idt.char_id as idt_char_id, idt.measured_value as idt_measured_value, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM insp_report_tb irt LEFT JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON irt.insp_report_id = idt.insp_report_id LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE irt.insp_report_id = #{inspReportId} ORDER BY irt.insp_report_id, idt.insp_data_id

SELECT irt.insp_report_id, irt.proj_id, irt.serial_no, irt.insp_dt, irt.create_dt, irt.update_dt, idt.insp_data_id as idt_insp_data_id, idt.insp_report_id as idt_insp_report_id, idt.char_id as idt_char_id, idt.measured_value as idt_measured_value, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM insp_report_tb irt LEFT JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON irt.insp_report_id = idt.insp_report_id LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE irt.serial_no = #{serialNo} ORDER BY irt.insp_report_id, idt.insp_data_id

SELECT irt.serial_no as serialNo, irt.insp_dt as inspDt FROM insp_report_tb irt WHERE irt.proj_id = #{projId} AND irt.serial_no LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN irt.serial_no = #{keyword} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, irt.serial_no ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM insp_report_tb WHERE serial_no = #{serialNo} )
SELECT irt.insp_report_id, irt.proj_id, irt.serial_no, irt.insp_dt, irt.create_dt, irt.update_dt FROM insp_report_tb irt WHERE irt.proj_id = #{projId} ORDER BY irt.insp_report_id
SELECT COUNT(irt.insp_report_id) FROM insp_report_tb irt WHERE irt.proj_id = #{projId}
SELECT irt.proj_id FROM insp_report_tb irt WHERE irt.proj_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY irt.proj_id ORDER BY MAX(irt.insp_dt) DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.update: UPDATE insp_report_tb SET proj_id = #{projId}, serial_no = #{serialNo}, insp_dt = #{inspDt}, update_dt = NOW() WHERE insp_report_id = #{inspReportId}
